user.title: Connect to Gaggiuino Local Profiler
user.description: Enter the URL of your Gaggiuino Local Profiler instance (e.g. http://homeassistant.local:8099).

data_description.api_token: Leave empty if no API token is configured in the add-on options.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to GLP. Check the URL and make sure the add-on is running.

abort.already_configured: This GLP instance is already configured.
